_purpose: Held-out decode workload for the glm-s4drop-0 THROUGHPUT phase: per arm, these prompts are greedily decoded (DRAFT=0, pinned cache config, seeded arm-order block randomization) and tok/s + realized per-cell miss-bytes/token are read from the engine counters. DISJOINT from T-build (masks were built there) and from the quality suite.

prompts.text: Give a plain-language explanation of why ships made of steel float even though steel is denser than water, ending with one everyday example.
Write a Python function count_words(path) that reads a text file and returns a dict mapping each lowercase word to its count, ignoring punctuation. Add a one-line docstring.
A cinema sells 342 tickets at 9 dollars and 187 tickets at 6 dollars. Compute the total revenue step by step and state the final amount.
Create a CSV table with header city,country,population_millions for Jakarta (Indonesia, 10.6), Lagos (Nigeria, 15.4), and Vienna (Austria, 1.9), then add one sentence naming the largest of the three.
请用中文写三句话，描述一个下雨天的火车站台上乘客们在做什么。
Explain in four sentences why the Moon shows phases over the course of a month, mentioning the roles of the Sun's light and the Moon's orbit.
In two short paragraphs, explain what a security deposit on a rental apartment is and under what typical conditions a tenant gets it back.
Write a six-line poem about a city waking up in winter, unrhymed, concrete images only.
